notes: 'subhanallah' = 'glory be to God', expresses awe. Common when admiring natural beauty (scenery, weather). Literal 'glory be to God' would shift register too far toward religious-formal. Variant 'subhan'allah' (apostrophe) deferred. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: whether subhanallah is used outside explicitly religious contexts in your conversational register, or whether 'wow' / 'gorgeous' would be more natural for everyday admiration.
